title: Disable 'Allow repository administrators to invite outside collaborators to repositories for this organization
remediation:
1. In top right corner of GitHub, click your profile photo, then click Your enterprise > Next to the organization, click Settings.
  2. Go to Access > Member privileges.
  3. Disable "Allow repository administrators to invite outside collaborators to repositories for this organization" option in the "Admin repository permissions" section.
remediationImpact: This setting blocks repositories admins to add outside collaborators.
